description.overview: The PBGV is a happy, extroverted French scent hound. Their cheerful personality and shaggy appearance make them delightful companions.
description.history: The Petit Basset Griffon Vendéen originated in France.
description.temperament: Known for being happy, extroverted, independent.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their rough, harsh coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: The PBGV is a happy, extroverted French scent hound. Their cheerful personality and shaggy appearance make them delightful companions.
